summary: TwoFaced - Adversarial AI-powered startup idea validation that forces ChatGPT and Claude into opposing roles — one building the strongest case for your idea, one destroying it — producing an honest structured verdict before you waste months building the wrong thing.

pass_1.bdr_summary: TwoFaced - Solo founders submit startup ideas via text input. Claude advocates for the idea while ChatGPT attacks it. System synthesizes structured verdict with strengths, flaws, and recommendation. Pay-per-analysis model with 60-second turnaround.

economics_snapshot.target_customer: Technical solo founders aged 35-55 building side projects
economics_snapshot.acquisition_channel: Direct marketing to existing ChatGPT/Claude users

questions_for_hero: What sample startup ideas should we use for manual testing?
How will you validate prompt quality without real API calls?
What constitutes a good vs bad analysis for initial testing?

pass_2.approved_bdr: TwoFaced - Manual adversarial validation tool. User pastes startup idea into form. Two hardcoded response templates simulate advocate vs adversary positions. Manual synthesis produces structured verdict. Static demo with mock Stripe flow.
pass_2.hld_document: Single HTML page with textarea input. Hardcoded response templates for 5-10 common startup types. Manual template selection based on input keywords. Static verdict generation using predefined structure. Mock Stripe checkout button with success page. No database, no real API calls, no user accounts.
engineering_questions: Which 5-10 startup archetypes need hardcoded templates?
How detailed should mock responses be for proof of concept?
What verdict structure fields are essential vs nice-to-have?

pass_3.qa_hlt_document: Test manual form submission with various startup idea lengths and types. Verify template matching logic works for common cases. Validate verdict structure completeness. Test mock payment flow end-to-end. Confirm 60-second target with manual template selection.

test_vectors.description: Submit marketplace startup idea, verify advocate template selection
Submit SaaS tool idea, verify adversary template selection
Test verdict synthesis with conflicting advocate/adversary outputs
Complete mock payment flow from submission to success page

risk_register.description: Hardcoded templates may not match submitted startup types
Manual template selection may exceed 60-second target
Mock payment flow may not represent real Stripe complexity

qa_questions_for_engineering: How will template matching handle edge cases and unusual startup types?
What fallback exists if no template matches the input?
How realistic should the mock payment integration be?

combined_task_list.description: Create HTML form with textarea for startup idea input
Write 5 hardcoded advocate response templates
Write 5 hardcoded adversary response templates
Build template matching logic based on keywords
Create verdict synthesis engine with structured output
Add mock Stripe checkout button and success page
Test all template combinations with sample inputs
Validate 60-second turnaround with manual process
Daily progress check - template quality review
Daily progress check - verdict structure feedback

pass_5.proposal_document_for_hero: TwoFaced Tier 1 Proof Slice: 8-day manual validation of adversarial AI concept. Hardcoded templates simulate advocate vs adversary analysis. Static verdict generation proves core value loop. Mock payment flow validates economic model. Zero integrations, manual template selection only. Delivers working demo to test user response before API investment.

hero_questions: Should we focus on 5 startup archetypes or expand to 10 for better coverage?
How detailed should the mock Stripe integration be for realistic testing?
What success criteria will determine if we proceed to Tier 2 with real APIs?

pass_1.bdr_summary: TwoFaced - Adversarial AI validation service where Claude advocates for startup ideas while ChatGPT attacks them, producing honest structured verdicts. Pay-per-analysis model targeting solo founders who need pressure-testing beyond single AI yes-machines.

economics_snapshot.target_customer: Solo founders 35-55 with day jobs building side projects
economics_snapshot.audience_scale_guess: 10K+ solo founders using AI for validation

questions_for_hero: Confirm API cost targets under $0.40 per analysis
Review structured verdict output format preferences

pass_2.approved_bdr: TwoFaced - Adversarial AI validation service using Claude as advocate and ChatGPT as adversary to produce structured startup idea verdicts. Pay-per-analysis model with Stripe integration, targeting solo founders needing honest pressure-testing.
pass_2.hld_document: Single-page web app with text input form. Backend orchestrates parallel API calls to OpenAI (adversary role) and Anthropic (advocate role). Synthesis engine combines responses into structured verdict with strengths, flaws, conflicts, questions, recommendation. Stripe checkout before analysis. No user accounts required. 60-second max processing time with progress indicators.
engineering_questions: Prompt engineering strategy for consistent adversarial quality
Error handling for API failures or timeouts
Rate limiting and abuse prevention without accounts

pass_3.qa_hlt_document: Test dual-API orchestration with mock responses. Validate synthesis logic produces consistent structured output. Test Stripe payment flow end-to-end. Verify timeout handling and error states. Test with various idea complexity levels.

test_vectors.description: Standard idea submission with successful dual API response
OpenAI API failure with graceful degradation

risk_register.description: API cost overrun due to prompt inefficiency

qa_questions_for_engineering: Fallback strategy if one API is down
Cost monitoring and circuit breaker implementation

combined_task_list.description: Setup Node.js backend with Express framework
Integrate OpenAI SDK for adversary role prompts
Integrate Anthropic SDK for advocate role prompts
Build synthesis engine for structured verdict output
Implement Stripe pay-per-analysis checkout
Create single-page frontend with input form
Connect frontend to backend API endpoints
Test dual-API orchestration with various inputs
Validate payment flow and error handling
End-to-end testing with real startup ideas
Day 2 progress check
Day 4 integration review
Day 6 synthesis testing
Day 8 payment flow validation
Day 10 final testing review

pass_5.proposal_document_for_hero: TwoFaced MVP - 10-day build plan for adversarial AI validation service. Delivers pay-per-analysis platform using Claude advocate vs ChatGPT adversary model. Core features: single-page input, dual API orchestration, structured verdict synthesis, Stripe integration. Target: $5-10 per analysis, 60-second turnaround, API costs under $0.40. Ready for solo founder execution with clear technical milestones and hero touchpoints every 2 days.

hero_questions: Confirm API rate limits for expected volume
Review prompt templates for adversarial consistency
